name: Binary Tree DFS (Pre-order)
description:
Depth First Search (DFS) is a fundamental graph/tree traversal algorithm. In a Pre-order traversal, we visit the nodes in the following order:

  • 1. Visit the Root
  • 2. Traverse the Left subtree
  • 3. Traverse the Right subtree

This visualization tracks the Call Stack, the Recursion Tree, and the resulting Traversal Order array simultaneously.
